data.metadata: {"description":"For me, he is the grain of sand that set the entire abstract hourglass in motion on Ethos. At the origin of the Giga wave, he played a key role in the massive arrival of hundreds and by extension thousands of users on Ethos. He also educated all of us tremendously at this level. Guezito is the kind of person who doesn’t make much noise but never stops working. A true example."}

translation.translatedDescription: For me, he is the grain of sand that set the entire abstract hourglass in motion on Ethos. At the origin of the Giga wave, he played a key role in the massive arrival of hundreds and by extension thousands of users on Ethos. He also educated all of us tremendously at this level. Guezito is the kind of person who doesn’t make much noise but never stops working. A true example.

data.metadata: {"description":"It's neither duty or reward that drives him, but passion. Never asking nothing in return ! Our ecosystem really need more ppl like Guezito :)"}

translation.translatedDescription: It's neither duty or reward that drives him, but passion. Never asking nothing in return ! Our ecosystem really need more ppl like Guezito :)

data.metadata: {"description":"Très présent au sein du discord Abstract, également sur X, Marvin est une personne impliqué au sein d'Abstract. Il suit la majorité des actualités en rapport avec Abstract, utilises la majorité des dApps de l'ecosystème et participe à la vie de communauté. \n\nUn véritable Gigachad !"}

translation.translatedDescription:
Very present within the Abstract Discord, also on X, Marvin is a person involved within Abstract. He follows the majority of news related to Abstract, uses the majority of the ecosystem's dApps, and participates in community life.

A true Gigachad!

data.metadata: {"description":"Je le vois partout, en plus d'être un Gigachad sur Abstract, il est très engagé au sein de la communauté crypto dans son ensemble. Il est très impliqué également au sein du Smol Talk, qui est un Space journalier Français, qui traite de divers sujets d'actualités crypto."}

translation.translatedDescription: I see him everywhere, in addition to being a Gigachad on Abstract, he is very engaged within the crypto community as a whole. He is also very involved in Smol Talk, which is a daily French Space that deals with various crypto news topics.

data.comment: A Gigachad present within the Abstract ecosystem

translation.translatedContent: A Gigachad present within the Abstract ecosystem
translation.translatedDescription:
Aliru is very present within the Abstract ecosystem, he is an active Gigachad, often there to help the community.

He brings his touch of freshness and originality.

I appreciate him for his authenticity.

data.comment: Le travailleur de l'ombre par exemple
data.metadata: {"description":"Guzeito est un énorme bosseur, il a developpé des applis trés intéressante qui aujourd'hui nous permettent de gagner du temps , il mérite beaucoup de reconnaissance et il devrait etre davantage connu pour  sa valeur.\nJe le vouch également pour son aide sur le fonctionnement d'Ethos au démarrage , il m'a accompagné et m'a expliqué le fonctionnement comme un mentor"}

translation.translatedDescription:
Guzeito is a huge workaholic, he has developed very interesting apps that today allow us to save time, he deserves a lot of recognition and he should be better known for his value.
I also vouch for his help on the operation of Ethos at the start, he accompanied me and explained how it works like a mentor

data.comment: The Gigachad of Abstract in Korea

translation.translatedContent: The Gigachad of Abstract in Korea
translation.translatedDescription:
KangBokSoon is the legend in the Korean Gigachad community. He is always on top, taking care of the Abstract Korea community in the Telegram chat and with content on X.

I also had a chance to meet him in Korea during KBW. SUPER NICE GUY.

KangBokSoon has super good energy that people want to be around!

data.comment: Nat Head of the Abstract Thailand Chapter & Guardian of the Community
data.metadata:
{"description":"Nat is both a devoted father and the Giga Chad of Abstract in Thailand. On Discord, he takes on the role of community moderator always present, always dependable.

He has global impact for sure, but his main mission is focused on educating and growing the Abstract ecosystem within Thailand. He’s a true builder, introducing new people to Abstract every day and making the community feel like home.

Sometimes he jokingly calls me “Oppa” yes, the Korean word just for fun in English. It always catches me off guard and makes everyone laugh.

He frequently hosts Spaces where he and other community members explore everything happening in Abstract. I often join just to listen and translate in Korean while learning from him.

I met him in person at KBW 2025, and we had a really nice conversation. He was there with Billy both of them are great friends and even better people.

We share the same sentiment at the end of the day

We love Abstract."}

translation.translatedContent: Nat Head of the Abstract Thailand Chapter & Guardian of the Community
translation.translatedDescription:
Nat is both a devoted father and the Giga Chad of Abstract in Thailand. On Discord, he takes on the role of community moderator always present, always dependable.

He has global impact for sure, but his main mission is focused on educating and growing the Abstract ecosystem within Thailand. He’s a true builder, introducing new people to Abstract every day and making the community feel like home.

Sometimes he jokingly calls me “Oppa” yes, the Korean word just for fun in English. It always catches me off guard and makes everyone laugh.

He frequently hosts Spaces where he and other community members explore everything happening in Abstract. I often join just to listen and translate in Korean while learning from him.

I met him in person at KBW 2025, and we had a really nice conversation. He was there with Billy both of them are great friends and even better people.

We share the same sentiment at the end of the day

We love Abstract.

data.metadata: {"description":"Met guezito for the first time in the Abstract Discord. Super active member, he guides Gigachads into the Ethos and helps everywhere he can. His Twitter has an unfairly low follower count right now and it’s very likely this number will 10x within the next year."}

translation.translatedDescription: Met guezito for the first time in the Abstract Discord. Super active member, he guides Gigachads into the Ethos and helps everywhere he can. His Twitter has an unfairly low follower count right now and it’s very likely this number will 10x within the next year.

data.metadata: {"description":"The best Giga Chad I have ever met in the Abstract community, the one who invited me into Ethos and helped me understand the value of reputation\n\nThe energy he radiates in the Abstract community is undeniable, always enthusiastic, energetic and supportive"}

translation.translatedDescription:
The best Giga Chad I have ever met in the Abstract community, the one who invited me into Ethos and helped me understand the value of reputation

The energy he radiates in the Abstract community is undeniable, always enthusiastic, energetic and supportive

He is incredibly active on social media defending what he believes in, namely AbstractChain.

His work has been rewarded, as today he is a Gigachad, the Holy Grail of Abstract roles.

I have witnessed his involvement and dedication on the gigachads channel on Abstract; he is helpful, committed, and full of good humor. He's a great guy who is a pleasure to spend time with.

data.metadata: {"description":"guezit0 regularly shares digests on Abstract, AI agents, and web3, structures materials, and helps newcomers politely. He relies on vetted sources, flags risks, and keeps a high bar. He knows how to connect people and he’s also an excellent Giga Chad"}

translation.translatedDescription: guezit0 regularly shares digests on Abstract, AI agents, and web3, structures materials, and helps newcomers politely. He relies on vetted sources, flags risks, and keeps a high bar. He knows how to connect people and he’s also an excellent Giga Chad

we first talked way like 4 months ago where I only wanted to give him some applause to how his work really means something to the community as we have some of our similar contributions

meanwhile after I'm a part of gigachad, he surprised me even more with how he build personalized leaderboard on top of the ethos to highlight people that are giving out support to others along with how he encourages and reminds to give support to people in abstract community

there are many people who have their own expertise field whether creativity, supportive, consistency, and someone who builds things on top, and guezit0 is one of a few who built

data.metadata: {"description":"He was one of the kindest people I met in the Abs Gigachad community  he always supported me, even during my rough times there. I had already left some words expressing my gratitude, and now I’m going to validate them with a monetary gesture!"}

translation.translatedDescription: He was one of the kindest people I met in the Abs Gigachad community  he always supported me, even during my rough times there. I had already left some words expressing my gratitude, and now I’m going to validate them with a monetary gesture!

data.metadata: {"description":"Not only builds cool tools like the ethos site for the giga community but also cares and engages regularly\n\nDrives the Abstract community forward, love to see it."}

{"description":"Val_ is an OG Abstract; he was present during the Abstract testnet. He and the team behind Ozy were the first to launch a collection on the Abstract Testnet.\n\nHe is very active within the ecosystem, using almost all of the apps offered today on Abstract and supporting them on X. He is an honest person who is not afraid to support what he loves."}

translation.translatedDescription:
Val_ is an OG Abstract; he was present during the Abstract testnet. He and the team behind Ozy were the first to launch a collection on the Abstract Testnet.

He is very active within the ecosystem, using almost all of the apps offered today on Abstract and supporting them on X. He is an honest person who is not afraid to support what he loves.

data.author: 0x6500555EEAAA4A0f040c558Ec0282c342daa5259
data.subject: 0x0000000000000000000000000000000000000000
data.comment: Abstract의 교육자이자 한 가정 아버지, Nat
data.metadata:
{
  "description": "Nat은 Abstract가 탄생하기 훨씬 전부터 Pudgy Penguins의 커뮤니티의 일원이었습니다.

Nat은 2021 부인에게 Pudgy Penguins NFT를 선물했고, 2022년 펏지 펭귄 태국 커뮤니티를 만들었으며, 2023년 펏지펭귄 MVP를 수상했어요. 이것만 보더라도 펏지펭귄 OG 중의 OG입니다.(증거는 그의 지갑에 있는 SBT를 확인하면 고개를 끄덕일 겁니다.)

이제 Abstract 이야기를 해보죠. 2024년 Abstract의 탄생과 동시에 태국 커뮤니티를 창설하고 기가채드들을 선별하는 역할을 했습니다(저도 그에게 발탁되어 Giga Chad가 된 것 같아요).

꾸준히 자신의 국가인 태국에서 세미나를 열어 사람들에게 지식을 나눠 주고, 실제로 밋업을 주최하며 적극적으로 사람들과 교류해서 생태계에 기여합니다. 그리고 Abstract 과련 AMA, Space, Live Stream 등 도 적극적으로 주최 하는데... 제가 캐치하지 못한 활동 범위를 가지고 있어요.

요즘은 Abstract에서 APAC 지역에 집중 마케팅을 펼치고 있는데 적극적인 지원을 하고 있습니다. Abstract Korea Guild 속칭 AKG를 만들어 한국 사람들을 열심히 결집시키고 앱스트랙트의 Dapp 게임들을 많이 소개합니다.

Nat은 에너자이저인가 봐요... 절대 안 지칩니다. 이러한 공로를 인정받아 2026년 지금 Abstract의 정식 팀원으로 합류했어요.

가끔씩 Nat의 피드에 가족 사진을 올리는데 자식과 함께 정말 행복해 보여요. 저도 이런 가정을 이루고 싶습니다. 실제로 KBW 2025 당시 Abstract 관련 행사에서 많이 만났고, 아주 나이스한 친구입니다."
}

translation.translatedContent: Nat, an educator at Abstract and a father
translation.translatedDescription:
Nat has been a part of the Pudgy Penguins community since long before Abstract was even born.

Nat gifted his wife a Pudgy Penguins NFT in 2021, created the Pudgy Penguins Thailand community in 2022, and won the Pudgy Penguins MVP in 2023. Just from this, you can tell he's an OG among OGs. (If you check the SBT in his wallet, you'll nod in agreement.)

Now, let's talk about Abstract. With the birth of Abstract in 2024, he founded the Thai community and played a role in selecting the Giga Chads (I think I was selected by him to become a Giga Chad).

He consistently holds seminars in his country, Thailand, to share knowledge with people, actively hosts meetups, and contributes to the ecosystem by actively interacting with people. He also actively hosts Abstract-related AMAs, Spaces, Live Streams, etc... He has a range of activities that I haven't even caught.

These days, Abstract is focusing on marketing in the APAC region, and he is actively supporting it. He created Abstract Korea Guild, also known as AKG, to diligently unite Koreans and introduce many of Abstract's Dapp games.

Nat must be an Energizer bunny... he never gets tired. In recognition of these contributions, he officially joined the Abstract team in 2026.

Occasionally, Nat posts family photos on his feed, and he looks really happy with his children. I want to build a family like that too. I actually met him a lot at Abstract-related events during KBW 2025, and he's a very nice guy.

data.author: 0x4d2b8676f52575354140436BD55b8E61F448D8a7
data.subject: 0x0000000000000000000000000000000000000000
data.metadata:
{
  "description": "skarly는 단순 기획자를 넘어 10년 이상의 시스템 설계 경력과 Wolf Game 리드 엔지니어로서의 실무 데이터가 증명된 1티어 개발자입니다.

24년 12월 펏지펭귄의 초대박 에어드랍으로 앱스트랙트의 기대치가 한껏 높아진 시점에 Abstract 체인에 OCH가 출시 했었죠... 그 당시 앱스트랙트 기반 NFT들이 힘을 못 쓰고 죽 쑤는 경우가 많았는데, OCH가 그 징크스를 제대로 깨버리고 분위기를 반전 시킨 기억이 아직도 생생합니다.

OnChain Heroes가 흥미로웠던 점은 재미 보다는 온체인 기반의 Risk to Earn 모델을 통해 유저의 투기적 욕구와 리스크 관리를 유도했고, 가챠 존과 무기 NFT를 활용한 소각 시스템은 인플레이션을 억제하려는 노력으로 나름 훌륭한 설계를 보여 줬다고 생각 합니다!($HERO 토큰도 생태계의 한 부분 이고요.)

지금은 앱스트랙트에 다양한 Dapp이 들어와서 활발해 졌지만 OnChain Heroes가 이런 초석을 깔아주지 않았다면 눈앞이 깜깜하네요...

최근들어 제가 운영하는 텔레그램 방에서도 테스트 버젼을 뿌리면서 직접뛰는 창립자라 더 믿음이 갑니다.

그리고 skarly가 한국인 이더라구요? 어쩐지 한글버젼 패치를 잘 해뒀더라니.. 저도 최근에 OCH NFT를 구매 했습니다. 새로운 시즌이 열리면 달려 봐야겠어요!",
  "source": "Ethos Everywhere Wallet",
  "version": "1.0",
  "client": "web"
}

translation.translatedDescription:
Skarly is more than just a planner; he is a top-tier developer proven by over 10 years of system design experience and practical data as the Lead Engineer of Wolf Game.

In December 2024, when expectations for Abstract were heightened due to Pudgy Penguins' mega airdrop, OCH was launched on the Abstract chain... At that time, many Abstract-based NFTs struggled and underperformed, but I vividly remember OCH breaking that jinx and reversing the atmosphere.

What was interesting about OnChain Heroes was that, rather than focusing on fun, it induced users' speculative desires and risk management through an on-chain-based Risk to Earn model. The incineration system using gacha zones and weapon NFTs showed a reasonably excellent design to suppress inflation! (The $HERO token is also part of the ecosystem.)

Now, various Dapps have entered Abstract and become active, but if OnChain Heroes hadn't laid this foundation, the future would be bleak...

Recently, I've been distributing test versions in the Telegram room I run, and I have more faith in the founder who is directly involved.

And it turns out skarly is Korean? No wonder he patched the Korean version so well. I also recently purchased an OCH NFT. I'll have to jump in when the new season opens!

data.author: 0xb7e9E82E858eBE4AF45F8F87E4D82E8CB23f8529
data.subject: 0x0000000000000000000000000000000000000000

translation.translatedDescription:
I chose not believe in the past that he stole other people's tweets until he did the same to me.

My Article was entirely stolen from top to bottom (theme, phrases, etc.)

He deleted the Article while denying and lying to me that he didn’t steal it, and he didn't try to apologize. And then he slowly came out that he used my Article in chatGPT as an “inspiration” while it was 80% the same.

What makes it worse is that I considered this dude a friend, and he straight lied to me.

data.comment: Ethic and skin in the game
data.metadata: {"description":"I met Papa on Abstract but I've seen him been involved in other project like pacmoon before. He has always tried to  go deeper and further with all the project he got interested in. It's why he became quickly a memelord and a giga chad on Abstract\n\nHe also are involved with \"smaller\" project like Abstract Ellies, a NFT collection with a cool mission toward Elephant. It shows that papa always try to keep a mindset close to reality and limit the bullshit"}

translation.translatedContent: Ethic and skin in the game
translation.translatedDescription:
I met Papa on Abstract, but I've seen him involved in other projects like Pacmoon before. He has always tried to go deeper and further with all the projects he's been interested in. That's why he quickly became a memelord and a giga chad on Abstract.

He's also involved with "smaller" projects like Abstract Ellies, an NFT collection with a cool mission toward Elephants. It shows that Papa always tries to keep a mindset close to reality and limit the bullshit.

data.author: 0x6DB8D2A5eCea86679d01Fc8D5cfda8B209cdF4cd
data.subject: 0x11ec1bD59eFc667C5d9bbb5b5Cd365DeC8dEe2cB
data.metadata: {"description":"I have been following Skarly since 2024 and joined OCH as one of the earliest participants, and during this time I have seen him methodically turn an idea into a product while keeping a high standard. He is a rare kind of builder who does the work himself, engages with the community, explains decisions clearly, and iterates quickly. Most importantly he does everything with heart, and you can feel it in the details of the game design and onchain logic. OCH feels cohesive and genuinely excellent, a product you want to return to, which is why it keeps gaining more fans. I like everything Skarly is doing and I am confident he will continue to raise the bar for onchain gaming."}

translation.translatedDescription: I have been following Skarly since 2024 and joined OCH as one of the earliest participants, and during this time I have seen him methodically turn an idea into a product while keeping a high standard. He is a rare kind of builder who does the work himself, engages with the community, explains decisions clearly, and iterates quickly. Most importantly he does everything with heart, and you can feel it in the details of the game design and onchain logic. OCH feels cohesive and genuinely excellent, a product you want to return to, which is why it keeps gaining more fans. I like everything Skarly is doing and I am confident he will continue to raise the bar for onchain gaming.

He’s creative, deeply engaged, and always finds ways to elevate the environment around him. data.subject: 0xF69F29a2AF99eB5Bd178B77283B6e5dF974fA557
data.metadata: {"description":"J'aime beaucoup Benz, il est trés appliqué dans la communauté Abstract et est d'ailleurs un acteur important d'Abstract France\nJ'aime beaucoup son contenu et ses analyses du marché"}

translation.translatedDescription: I really like Benz, he is very involved in the Abstract community and is also an important player in Abstract France. I really like his content and his market analysis.

data.author: 0x50641a31170bdC620f1c90f00C9d8f8e6E095BD6
data.subject: 0xEac0fbBA47ea4D3ffF69019527092568492f2450
data.metadata: {"description":"Un de mes créateurs de contenu préféré, je l'ai connu sur Blast ou j'ai appris à apprécier ses contenus notamment ses compte rendu journalier nous résumant les actualités et les informations de la chaine.\nChose qu'il a continué sur Abstract, en plus il est le fondateur de la collection NFT The Wolves, une communauté trés inclusive qui aide énormément ses partisants"}

translation.translatedDescription:
One of my favorite content creators, I discovered him on Blast where I learned to appreciate his content, especially his daily reports summarizing the news and information of the channel.
He continued this on Abstract, and he is also the founder of the NFT collection The Wolves, a very inclusive community that greatly helps its supporters.
